summary: Current ecosystem packaging truth for OpenUI MCP Studio. This contract explains the plugin-grade public distribution package for Codex and Claude Code, the repo-owned OpenClaw public-ready bundle, and which supporting lanes remain parked or operator-only.

currentTruth.codex: The official Codex Plugin Directory exists and this repo now ships a Plugin Directory-ready package through MCP configuration, starter bundles, proof loop, and troubleshooting.
currentTruth.claudeCode: The official Claude Code marketplace exists and this repo now ships a marketplace-ready package through MCP configuration, starter bundles, proof loop, and troubleshooting.
currentTruth.genericMcpHost: A reusable stdio MCP launch template is documented for other MCP-capable hosts.
currentTruth.formalSkills: Installable public starter pack through @openui/skills-kit plus repo-owned examples/skills mirror.
currentTruth.pluginLikePackaging: Plugin-grade public distribution package is current inside the repo-owned starter surface, not marketplace packaging.
currentTruth.openclawBridge: The official OpenClaw public surface exists as ClawHub, and the repo now ships a ClawHub-ready public package through starter bundles, install/proof loop, and discoverable contract artifacts, without claiming listing approval.
currentTruth.sdk: Supporting or parked package surface through @openui/sdk.
currentTruth.hostedApi: Supporting or parked self-hosted runtime through the repo CLI and hosted API contract.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The official Codex Plugin Directory exists, and local stdio MCP installation, starter bundles, proof loop, and troubleshooting are documented as one repo-owned distribution surface.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming a Codex marketplace item or any vendor-approved plugin listing.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The official Claude Code marketplace exists, and local stdio MCP installation, starter bundles, proof loop, and troubleshooting are documented as one repo-owned distribution surface.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming a Claude Code plugin listing or managed hosted runtime.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The repo documents a reusable stdio launch contract for MCP-capable hosts beyond Codex and Claude Code.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming vendor-native verification, a marketplace listing, or a host-specific support promise.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The repo compares itself against broader coding-agent traffic but does not ship a dedicated install or discovery path for OpenHands today.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming current install-ready packaging or an official OpenHands integration.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The repo treats OpenCode as a comparison/binding reference, not a current packaging surface.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming current install-ready packaging or an official OpenCode integration.

clientSupportMatrix.why: The official OpenClaw public surface exists as ClawHub, and the repo now exposes a repo-owned OpenClaw public-ready bundle: starter config, public starter pack, proof loop, and discoverable contract artifacts. That is still not an official OpenClaw integration or verified runtime lane.
clientSupportMatrix.notFor: Claiming a verified OpenClaw runtime, ClawHub listing, marketplace item, or official plugin/skills publication.

surfaces.title: Public Skills starter kit
surfaces.audience: maintainers and builders drafting future skill-shaped integrations or OpenClaw-style bridge experiments
surfaces.role: installable starter pack with repo mirror and bounded contract examples
surfaces.packageShape: public package @openui/skills-kit plus repo mirror under examples/skills
surfaces.notFor: claiming a shipped public Skills runtime, marketplace item, or hosted integration platform

surfaces.title: Codex and Claude plugin-grade public distribution package
surfaces.audience: Codex, Claude Code, and other MCP-capable hosts that can spawn local stdio servers
surfaces.role: configuration snippets, starter bundles, CLI guidance, proof loop, and troubleshooting for local MCP installation
surfaces.packageShape: CLI guide plus host-adaptable config snippets, starter bundles, proof metadata, and official-surface-ready samples; not a listed marketplace artifact
surfaces.notFor: claiming a Codex marketplace item, a published Claude Code plugin, or vendor-native verification for every MCP-capable host

surfaces.title: OpenClaw public-ready repo-owned package
surfaces.audience: OpenClaw-side builders and operators who need a discoverable install/proof path before any official listing exists
surfaces.role: repo-owned OpenClaw starter bundle with sample config, proof loop, and discoverable artifacts
surfaces.packageShape: starter bundle plus contracts and docs for a ClawHub-ready artifact, not an official listing artifact
surfaces.notFor: claiming a verified OpenClaw runtime, ClawHub listing, or official marketplace approval

surfaces.title: Hosted client SDK
surfaces.audience: developers evaluating future thin-client or package surfaces
surfaces.role: thin client for the self-hosted OpenUI Hosted API kept as a supporting lane
surfaces.notFor: claiming registry publication, front-door primary status, replacing the local stdio MCP runtime, or implying managed SaaS

surfaces.title: Self-hosted OpenUI Hosted API
surfaces.audience: adapter authors and future hosted-surface planners
surfaces.role: self-hosted HTTP runtime surfaced through the root CLI and retained as a supporting lane
surfaces.packageShape: repo CLI entrypoint plus internal hosted-api source package
surfaces.notFor: claiming a managed SaaS deployment, front-door primary status, control plane, or remote write surface

operatorOnlyActions: future GitHub Homepage override beyond the current Pages front door
GitHub Social Preview selection and verification
publishing releases and refreshing attached public assets
domain, DNS, TLS, and hosted infrastructure setup
